Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog

Class NumberFieldBase<T extends Number>

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog.NumberFieldBase<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITextComponent<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DoubleField, IntegerField, LongField
public abstract class NumberFieldBase<T extends Number> extends Object implements ITextComponent<T>
This abstract base class encapsulates the name, range, and value of a numeric textField along with a GUI text field and methods to operate upon it. Subclasses must implement the getValue() method.

  • Constructor Details

    • NumberFieldBase

      public NumberFieldBase(NumberFormat numberFormat, String name, T min, T max, T initial)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      numberFormat - The numeric format to be used to display the initial value.
      name - The name of the textField.
      min - The value that the entered value must be greater than (may be null).
      max - The value that the entered value must be less than (may be null).
      initial - The initial value.

      public abstract T getValue()
      Get the numeric value from the textField, if possible, otherwise return null if no valid number is present in the textField.
